description_long: This object consists of seven cylindrical, dark metallic tubes bundled together with two wide, olive-green straps. Affixed to the top is an electronic control unit featuring a digital display, several buttons, indicator lights, and a few rotary dials, all housed in a rectangular casing with a greenish tint. A yellowish wire extends from the control unit and loops over the bundle, suggesting a connection to the internal mechanism. The ends of the cylinders are capped and uniformly colored, giving the appearance of industrial-grade explosive sticks. The control unit is detailed with red, green, and black components, and the overall construction appears robust and utilitarian. The object is compact, with a design that suggests portability and concealment.
description: A bundle of seven dark metallic cylinders strapped together, topped with a detailed electronic control unit featuring a digital display, buttons, and wires.
description_view_0: Front view shows the electronic control unit with its digital display, buttons, and indicator lights clearly visible atop the bundled cylinders.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the circular ends of the seven cylinders and the profile of the control unit, with the wire looping over the bundle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the bundled cylinders and straps, with the control unit barely visible and no detailed electronics exposed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the ends of the cylinders and the side profile of the control unit, with visible wiring and buttons.
attribute_detonation_mechanism: Detonation appears to be controlled via an electronic unit with a digital timer, buttons, and switches, possibly triggered by pressing a button or activating a switch.
